title: Two-Dimensional Human-Centered AI (HCAI) Framework
description: A diagram illustrating the dual-axis approach to designing AI systems that prioritize human control and augmentation.
elements: Quadrant I: High Automation, High Human Control
Quadrant II: High Automation, Low Human Control
Quadrant III: Low Automation, Low Human Control
Quadrant IV: Low Automation, High Human Control
relationships: The Y-Axis represents the level of Human Control from Low (Bottom) to High (Top)
The X-Axis represents the level of Automation from Low (Left) to High (Right)
An AI System's design can be mapped onto the framework based on its levels of Automation and Human Control
The ideal design space for HCAI is Quadrant I, maximizing both automation and human oversight
Quadrant II represents high-risk 'Full Automation' with low human control
Quadrants III and IV represent lower-automation systems with varying levels of human involvement
